title: Rewrite full session controller to remove open redirect
prompt: `test_fixtures/open_redirect_session.ex` contains a login flow and an OAuth callback that both redirect to user-controlled URLs via `redirect(external: ...)`. Rewrite the module so that: (a) `create/2` validates the return_to against a static allowlist of internal paths and falls back to `/`, (b) `oauth_callback/2` ignores the `state` param as a destination and redirects to a fixed path like `/dashboard`, and (c) no `redirect(external: ...)` call anywhere uses a value originating from `params`. Write the fix to `lib/my_app_web/controllers/session_controller.ex`.
tier_rationale: Full-module rewrite with two related open-redirect sites. Each fix is canonical.
